text.tspan: Used in HashiCorp Consul/Serf, Apache Cassandra (variant),
Uber's Ringpop, ScyllaDB, and many service-discovery layers.

g.text: Ping missed u2014 ask K random nodes to ping B indirectly
If B truly dead, all witness PING-REQs also fail
If B is actually alive (false suspicion), B refutes
ACK u2014 (network blip on Au2192B path?)
no acks from C or D u2192 mark B suspect
drop suspect; B back to alive
